title: myrsine excelsa
intro: Myrsine excelsa, also known as the Arahanga, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and parts of the Pacific Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Myrsine excelsa include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
